👤 Owner: Gagniuc

📝 Repository: Gagniuc/Jupiter-Bioinformatics-V4

📄 Descrizione: Jupiter Bioinformatics is a browser-based tool for interactive pairwise sequence alignment and heatmap visualization. Open the file and start aligning.
